articles.title: More Trump tariffs? US names India in its Section 301 findings; proposes additional duties
articles.description: The USTR released the outcome of 60 investigations conducted under Section 301, identifying India among 54 economies that, according to its assessment, do not have adequate measures in place to prohibit or effectively prevent the import of goods allegedly produced using forced labour.

articles.title: Maharashtra-model in Bengal? Didi fights to fend off crisis amid MLA exodus buzz
articles.description: The political landscape in Bengal is charged with speculation as a prominent BJP minister asserts that more than 50 Trinamool MLAs could defect amidst growing schisms within the party. This development comes on the heels of the 'Signgate' scandal, where ousted MLAs are claiming their signatures were forged for the Leader of Opposition position.

articles.title: IND vs AFG: Siraj's availability hangs in the balance; Nabi on standby for one-off Test
articles.description: Mohammed Siraj's availability for the Afghanistan Test remains uncertain, with selectors monitoring the pacer's workload after a long IPL season. Jammu & Kashmir seamer Auqib Nabi, one of the six net bowlers, is on standby and will join the squad if Siraj is rested.
articles.full_text: Pratyush Raj is a cricket journalist with TOI Sports, specializing in all things cricket, both on and off the field. He began his career with the Business Standard before following his passion as a sports reporter for the Times of India in Chandigarh. Pratyush has also contributed to the sports coverage of India Today Group and his last stint was with The Indian Express. His love for sports was nurtured during his upbringing in flood-prone Saharsa, a district in North Bihar, where Cricket Samrat was his constant companion. Read More

articles.title: 'Economic Fury' on Iran: US seizes Tehran's biggest crypto network amid peace talks
articles.description: The US has imposed sanctions on Iran's largest cryptocurrency exchange, Nobitex, and its executives, accusing them of aiding the Iranian government and sanctioned entities in bypassing Western restrictions. This move, dubbed 'Economic Fury,' aims to increase economic pressure on Tehran amid ongoing conflicts.

articles.title: Watch: Air defence battle over Kuwait as Patriot missiles respond to Iranian strike
articles.description: Middle East tensions flared as Iran launched missiles targeting US facilities in Kuwait and Bahrain, which were intercepted or failed to hit. The US responded with strikes on an Iranian military site. This escalation follows a major US military campaign against Iran earlier this year, with ongoing exchanges and stalled negotiations pushing the region towards wider conflict.

articles.title: "Bitcoin is garbage": Clavicular's brutal Bitcoin takedown sparks outrage and mockery across crypto world
articles.description: Controversial streamer Clavicular sparked widespread backlash after calling Bitcoin "garbage" and a "horrible investment" during a viral livestream. He argued that the cryptocurrency lacks intrinsic value and claimed its biggest gains are already behind it. His comments drew criticism from crypto supporters, who defended Bitcoin's growing institutional adoption and long-term potential. The rant also revived discussions about Clavicular's past disagreements with fellow streamer Sneako and previous crypto-related controversies.

articles.title: ODI tickets worth Rs 52.36 lakh went unsold: Khanna
articles.description: "Tickets worth Rupees 52,36,000 were unsold. Why all the tickets were not sold-out? DDCA started online ticket sale quite late that too without proper advertisement," Khanna claimed in a media release.

articles.title: UP PGT Result 2026 declared: 2,253 candidates qualify for interview round- here's how to check your marks
articles.description: The Uttar Pradesh Education Service Selection Commission has announced the UP PGT written examination results for 2026. A total of 2,253 candidates have provisionally qualified for the interview round for 624 lecturer posts. Subject-wise results are available on the official website, upessc.up.gov.in.

articles.title: TG Inter Supply Results 2026: Expected date and time
articles.description: The Telangana State Board of Intermediate Education (TGBIE) is expected to release the TG Inter 1st and 2nd Year Advanced Supplementary Results 2026 between June 10 and June 16 at 11:00 AM IST. Conducted after exams held in May 2026, the results will be announced via official press conference in Hyderabad. Students can check scores on results.cgg.gov.in and tgbie.cgg.gov.in. Minimum passing marks are 35% per subject for qualification.
articles.full_text: The Telangana State Board of Intermediate Education (TGBIE) is expected to release the TG Inter 1st and 2nd Year Advanced Supplementary Results 2026 between June 10 and June 16 at 11:00 AM IST. Conducted after exams held in May 2026, the results will be announced via official press conference in Hyderabad. Students can check scores on results.cgg.gov.in and tgbie.cgg.gov.in. Minimum passing marks are 35% per subject for qualification.

articles.title: The trust deficit at work: How ethical failures are driving employees to quit
articles.description: A growing trust deficit is reshaping workplaces, with many employees questioning whether companies truly follow the values they promote. A Resume Now survey found that fears of retaliation, favouritism, and ethical inconsistencies are pushing workers toward silence and, increasingly, the exit door. The findings highlight how credibility, fairness, and psychological safety have become critical factors in employee retention.

articles.title: Chandigarh Teacher Recruitment 2026 notification expected for 582 posts of NTT JBT TGT PGT
articles.description: Chandigarh Teacher Recruitment 2026: Chandigarh Administration Department of Education has issued a public notice for upcoming recruitment of around 582 teaching posts across NTT, JBT, TGT and PGT categories. The official notification is expected by 31 July 2026, with applications likely to begin in August 2026. Eligible candidates from other states may apply. The selection process will follow High Court directions, and detailed vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, and examination schedule will be released on the official website Chandigarh website.

The selection process will follow High Court directions, and detailed vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, and examination schedule will be released on the official website Chandigarh website.

articles.title: Was Ahaan FaceTiming with Aneet on UK film sets? - WATCH
articles.description: A recent video of Ahaan Panday on a video call in the UK has fueled speculation about his rumoured romance with Aneet Padda, his 'Saiyaara' co-star. Fans believe the woman in the clip is Aneet, reigniting interest in their alleged off-screen relationship. The duo is reportedly set to reunite for another romantic drama.

articles.title: Quote of the day by Zendaya
articles.description: Zendaya's insights in 'Between U and Me' resonate powerfully with tweens, as she passionately advocates for embracing one's individuality over blending in. By urging them to cultivate their unique abilities, she inspires a journey toward self-acceptance and inner happiness, empowering them to shine in their own light.

articles.title: Manoj on 'Ghooskhor Pandat' row: 'They targeted my daughter'
articles.description: Manoj Bajpayee expressed deep hurt over death threats and abuse directed at his family due to his film's title, 'Ghooskhor Pandat'. He clarified the title refers to a specific Delhi Police character, not an entire community. Bajpayee emphasized the distinction between criticism and online toxicity, highlighting the distress caused to his wife and daughter. Read on to know more in detail.

articles.title: 'Man of Tomorrow': Superman battles Lex Luthor in viral videos - WATCH
articles.description: Filming for 'Man of Tomorrow' has commenced, with David Corenswet's Superman seen in intense battle with Nicholas Hoult's Lex Luthor. Set photos reveal Luthor in his formidable war suit, engaging in a street fight. The movie, slated for a July 2027 release, also features Rachel Brosnahan as Lois Lane and Lars Eidinger as Brainiac.
